item.title: 交易日暂歇，但能持续多久？
item.description: 周三，美国和欧洲股市大幅上涨，市场对中东冲突可能很快平息的预期提振了投资情绪，同时油价和能源市场的企稳也为其他受挫资产的反弹奠定了基础。【原文：U.S. and European stock markets registered solid gains on Wednesday, on hopes that conflict in the Middle East might soon cool, while stabilization in oil and energy markets also helped lay the ground for a rebound in other beaten-down assets.】

item.title: Palantir面临挑战，需将Anthropic从五角大楼的人工智能软件中移除
item.description: 在人工智能实验室与五角大楼就安全防护措施发生争执后，Palantir成为最新一家面临与Anthropic解除合作关系的艰难任务的公司，这引发了人们对关键军事软件平台的质疑。【原文：Palantir is the latest company to face the painful task ​of unwinding from Anthropic in the wake of the AI lab's dispute with the Pentagon over safety guardrails, raising ‌questions about a key military software platform.】

item.title: 亚马逊再度裁员，此次涉及机器人部门
item.description: 亚马逊周二证实已裁撤机器人部门员工，至少100个白领岗位受影响，两名知情人士向路透社透露。【原文：Amazon on Tuesday confirmed it laid off staff across its robotics unit, with at least ​100 white-collar jobs affected, two people familiar with ‌the matter told Reuters.】

item.title: 美国鹰牌预测销售额增长将超预期，得益于富裕年轻消费者的需求
item.description: 美国鹰牌服饰公司周三预测全年销售额将超出华尔街预期，其服装及配饰产品凭借营销驱动的消费需求，获得了富裕消费者的青睐。【原文：American Eagle Outfitters forecast annual sales above Wall Street estimates on Wednesday, backed ​by marketing-driven demand for its apparel and accessories from affluent shoppers.】

item.title: 博通营收超预期，人工智能推动定制芯片需求
item.description: 芯片设计公司博通周三预测第二季度营收将超出华尔街预期，这表明用于人工智能应用的数据中心对先进芯片的需求旺盛。【原文：Chip designer Broadcom forecast second-quarter revenue above Wall Street estimates on Wednesday, a sign ​of strong demand for advanced chips used in data centers powering artificial ‌intelligence applications.】

item.title: Okta预测在经济不确定性背景下，公司将迎来上市以来最缓慢的营收增长
item.description: Okta周三公布的季度营收预期低于华尔街预期，预计将出现2017年首次公开募股（IPO）以来的首次个位数增长，因经济不确定性抑制了企业技术支出。【原文：Okta forecast first-quarter revenue below Wall Street expectations on Wednesday, projecting single-digit growth for the first ​time since its 2017 IPO as economic uncertainty ‌weighs on enterprise technology spending.】

item.title: 法官命令特朗普政府对进入美国的商品完成关税评估程序，此前相关关税已被裁定无效。
item.description: 据法庭文件显示，美国贸易法庭一名法官周三下令政府完成货物入境手续，无需征收上月被美国最高法院裁定无效的关税。【原文：A U.S. trade ‌court judge on Wednesday ordered the government ​to finalize ​goods entries into the ⁠United States without ​assessing tariffs that ​were struck down by the U.S. Supreme Court ​last month, according ​to a court filing.】

item.title: 中国全国人大将审议批准经济增长与政策规划，美中竞争日益加剧
item.description: 中国年度人大会议于周四开幕，预计北京将公布其升级产业基础、缩小与美国的科技差距以及重申提振消费需求的雄心。【原文：China’s annual parliament meeting opens on Thursday, with Beijing expected to unveil ambitions to upgrade its industrial base, close the technology gap with the ​U.S. and renew its pledge to shore up consumer demand.】

item.title: 花旗将铝0-3个月合约目标价上调至每吨3600美元
item.description: 花旗将伦敦金属交易所铝0-3个月合约价格目标上调至每吨3600美元，此前目标为3400美元/吨，并表示在伊朗战争爆发后供应中断及不可抗力声明的背景下，价格在乐观情景下可能攀升至4000美元/吨。【原文：Citi has raised its LME aluminium 0–3 month price ​target to $3,600 a metric ton, up from $3,400/t, and said prices could climb to $4,000/t ‌in a bull-case scenario, citing supply disruptions and force majeure declarations after war broke out in Iran.】

item.title: 服装科技初创公司CaaStle创始人承认3亿美元欺诈案罪名成立
item.description: 联邦检察官称，破产服装科技初创公司CaaStle的创始人周三承认，其通过欺诈手段骗取投资者逾3亿美元。【原文：The once-prominent entrepreneur of bankrupt clothing technology startup CaaStle pleaded guilty on Wednesday in connection with ​her scheme to defraud investors out of more ‌than $300 million, federal prosecutors said.】

item.title: 美国柴油价格突破每加仑4美元，中东冲突升级推高燃料成本
item.description: 周三，美国零售柴油均价时隔近两年首次突破每加仑4美元大关，且随着美以与伊朗的冲突持续升级，本周晚些时候油价预计将进一步攀升，这可能导致从食品到家具等各类商品价格大幅上涨，令消费者面临"价格标签冲击"。【原文：Average U.S. retail diesel prices surpassed $4 a gallon for the first time in nearly two years on ​Wednesday and are set to rise further later in the week as the U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran dragged on, threatening ‌to hit consumers with sticker shocks on everything from food to furniture.】

item.title: 美洲重质原油价格触及多年高点，伊朗冲突扰乱石油市场
item.description: 周三，美洲产重质原油价格飙升至多年高位，因美以对伊朗的袭击阻碍了中东产同类原油的出口。【原文：Prices for heavy crude produced in the Americas surged to multi-year highs on Wednesday, as the U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran stymied exports of similar oil ​produced in the Middle East.】

item.title: 美国邮政局正招聘重组顾问，因其资金可能在2027年耗尽
item.description: 美国邮政局长戴维·施泰纳在接受路透社采访时表示，美国邮政局正聘请重组顾问以应对日益加剧的财务困境。【原文：The U.S. Postal Service is hiring restructuring advisers to help address its mounting financial troubles, ​Postmaster General David Steiner told Reuters in an interview.】

item.title: 美联储报告显示经济前景向好，就业形势稳定
item.description: 美联储周三在一份报告中称，近期美国经济活动略有回升，物价持续上涨，就业水平保持稳定。这份报告可能让央行决策者在为两周后的下次政策会议做准备时，对通胀走势感到困惑。【原文：U.S. economic activity rose a bit, prices ​continued to increase and employment levels were stable in recent weeks, the Federal Reserve said on Wednesday ‌in a report that may leave central bank policymakers puzzling about the path of inflation as they prepare for their next policy meeting in two weeks.】

item.title: 地中海航运公司宣布对部分航线征收紧急燃油附加费
item.description: 地中海航运公司周三表示，将对部分航线征收紧急燃油附加费，该措施将于3月16日生效。【原文：MSC said on Wednesday it was imposing ​an emergency fuel surcharge ‌on some trade routes, effective March 16.】

item.title: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋表示，由于公司即将进行首次公开募股（IPO），英伟达将无法向OpenAI投资1000亿美元。
item.description: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋表示，向OpenAI投资1000亿美元的机会可能不会出现，因为这家ChatGPT的创建者计划在今年晚些时候上市。【原文：Nvidia CEO ​Jensen Huang said that the ‌opportunity to invest $100 billion in OpenAI is probably not ​in the cards as ​the ChatGPT creator is ⁠set to go public ​later this year.】

item.title: 据《金融时报》报道，毕马威任命前澳大利亚负责人温格罗夫为全球首席执行官。
item.description: 据《金融时报》周三报道，四大会计师事务所毕马威已任命其前澳大利亚负责人加里·温格罗夫为下一任全球首席执行官，消息人士透露了这一消息。【原文：Big Four ​accounting firm ‌KPMG has named its ​former ​Australia head, Gary ⁠Wingrove, ​as its ​next global chief executive, the ​Financial ​Times reported on ‌Wednesday, ⁠citing people familiar with ​the ​matter.】

item.title: 独家：科技巨头集团向五角大楼的赫格塞斯表示，他们对将Anthropic列为供应链风险表示"关切"
item.description: 美国大型科技行业组织周三就国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯将人工智能公司Anthropic列为供应链风险一事向其表达关切，称此举给企业带来不确定性，可能危及军方获取最佳产品与服务的能力。【原文：A Big Tech industry group on ​Wednesday expressed concern to U.S. Secretary of Defense ‌Pete Hegseth about his declaring AI company Anthropic a supply-chain risk, saying it creates uncertainty for companies that could threaten the military's ​access to the best products and services.】

item.title: 全球企业、投资者争相抢购股票，中东冲突爆发之际
item.description: 据顾问和最新数据显示，随着中东紧张局势升级为冲突，包括海湾地区在内的多家企业和投资者近日启动大规模股票抛售，筹集资金达数百亿美元。【原文：Companies and investors, including from the Gulf, kicked off large share sales raising tens of billions ​of dollars in recent days as tensions in the Middle East erupted into conflict, according to advisers and new figures.】

item.title: 高盛高管称，未来几年人工智能颠覆将挑战贷款决策
item.description: 高盛集团一位高管表示，人工智能对商业模式的颠覆性影响存在不确定性，这将使贷款机构在未来两年内面临更复杂的风险承担决策。【原文：Uncertainty about artificial intelligence's disruption of business ​models will complicate lenders' decisions over ‌how much risk to take on in the next two years, a senior Goldman ​Sachs executive said.】

item.title: 大众旗下曾专注纯电的Scout品牌，其混合动力车型需求激增
item.description: 大众汽车旗下新品牌Scout Motors周三表示，其首款车型已收到逾16万份预订订单，多数客户选择增程混合动力版本而非纯电动车型。【原文：Volkswagen’s new Scout Motors brand has taken more than 160,000 reservations for its first model, with most customers opting for an ​extended-range hybrid version instead of full electric, a top executive said ‌on Wednesday.】

item.title: 美国零售商忙于应对关税变动，消费者谨慎态度持续
item.description: 随着关税格局再度变化，美国零售商正开始谨慎地重新评估其战略，这为今年消费者的消费模式注入了新的不确定性。【原文：U.S. retailers are beginning to cautiously re-evaluate their strategies as the tariff landscape shifts again, injecting fresh uncertainty into consumer spending patterns for the year.】

item.title: 《堡垒之夜》将重返全球Google Play商店
item.description: Epic Games周三宣布，其热门大逃杀游戏《堡垒之夜》将登陆谷歌Play商店全球平台。【原文：Epic ​Games' popular ‌battle ​royale ​title Fortnite ⁠will ​be made ​available on ​Google's ​Play Store worldwide, ‌the ⁠company said ​on ​Wednesday.】

item.title: 特斯拉英国销量二月暴跌，但仍领先比亚迪，最新汽车数据显示
item.description: 特斯拉2月在英国销量大幅下滑，但仍领先于中国竞争对手比亚迪，新汽车周三发布的数据显示，纯电动汽车（BEV）占整体汽车市场的四分之一。【原文：Tesla's UK sales fell ​sharply in ‌February, but still outpaced Chinese ​rival BYD, ​data from New ⁠Automotive showed ​on Wednesday, as ​battery-electric vehicles (BEVs) made up a quarter ​of the ​overall car market.】

item.title: 独家：Four Loko品牌所有者正考虑出售这家历史悠久的酒精饮料品牌，消息人士称
item.description: 据三位知情人士透露，罐装酒精饮料品牌Four Loko的母公司正考虑出售该品牌，估值约4亿美元。该品牌曾在2000年代末风靡美国大学校园，后因监管压力调整配方。【原文：The ​parent company of Four Loko, the canned alcoholic beverage that became a college campus ‌sensation in the late 2000s before being reformulated under regulatory pressure, is exploring a sale of the brand that could value it at around $400 million, according to three people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 英特尔首席财务官称，首席执行官陈立武正重新考虑该芯片制造商18A制程技术的命运
item.description: 英特尔首席财务官戴维·津斯纳周三在旧金山一场技术会议上表示，该公司首席执行官陈立武正开始将18A制程技术视为面向外部客户的潜在产品，而去年该技术主要仅用于内部用途。【原文：Intel CEO Lip-Bu ​Tan is ‌now starting to recognize ​its ​18A manufacturing technology as ⁠a ​potential offering ​for external clients after relegating it ​largely to ​internal use last ‌year, ⁠Chief Financial Officer David Zinsner ​said ​on ⁠Wednesday during a ​tech conference ​in ⁠San Francisco.】

item.title: 独家：知情人士称，Anthropic投资者正推动缓和五角大楼在人工智能安全保障问题上的冲突
item.description: 知情人士透露，部分人类本位主义投资者的投资者正争分夺秒地试图控制人工智能研究实验室与五角大楼纠纷引发的负面影响，他们担心这场持续的争端可能重创该公司的业务。【原文：Some Anthropic investors are racing to contain fallout from the AI research lab's dispute ​with the Pentagon, seven people familiar with the matter said, for fear that an ongoing spat could devastate the company's business.】

item.title: 贝克休斯计划发行100亿美元跨境债券，彭博社报道
item.description: 据彭博新闻周三援引知情人士报道，贝克休斯计划通过跨境债券发行筹集约100亿美元资金，用于收购Chart Industries。【原文：Baker Hughes is planning to raise about $10 billion ​from a cross-border bond sale ‌to help fund its acquisition of Chart Industries, Bloomberg News reported on Wednesday, citing sources ​familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 印度寻求荷兰技术助力半导体产业推进
item.description: 印度贸易代表团周三访问了荷兰半导体中心埃因霍温，探讨投资机会。与此同时，新德里正加速推进建设本土芯片产业的进程。【原文：A ​trade delegation from India visited the Dutch semiconductor hub of Eindhoven on ‌Wednesday to discuss investment opportunities as New Delhi accelerates its efforts to build a domestic chip industry.】

item.title: Allstate因追踪司机手机位置面临隐私诉讼
item.description: Allstate保险公司面临一起隐私诉讼，该诉讼指控这家家财险和车险公司未经同意非法追踪驾驶员手机位置，利用相关数据提高保费或拒绝承保，并将数据出售给其他保险公司。【原文：Allstate must face a privacy lawsuit ‌accusing the home and auto insurer of illegally tracking drivers through their cellphones without consent, using their data to raise premiums or deny coverage, and selling the data ​to other insurers.】
